name: week-md-reconcile-phase2
goal: Display reconciled action items in the web UI's meeting triage view with distinct styling and matched text, completing the auto-reconciliation feature.

userStories.title: Thread completedItems through backend
userStories.description: Read now/week.md and now/scratchpad.md in runProcessingSessionTestable() and pass completed items to processMeetingExtraction(). Log event when items are reconciled.
acceptanceCriteria: Logs event: 'Skipped N items already completed in week.md'

userStories.title: Update frontend types for reconciled items
userStories.description: Add 'reconciled' to ReviewItem.source and add optional matchedText field in packages/apps/web/src/api/types.ts.

userStories.title: Wire matchedText through backend response
userStories.description: Include stagedItemMatchedText in the session result so frontend can display it. Follow existing pattern for stagedItemStatus, stagedItemSource.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend can access matched text for reconciled items

userStories.title: Display reconciled items in ReviewItems component
userStories.description: Show reconciled items with distinct styling (muted/greyed) and display matched text. Allow user to override skip decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Reconciled items have distinct visual styling (muted, grey, or badge)
Matched text displayed below item text
User can override skip decision (un-skip action)

userStories.title: Add tests for reconciliation flow
userStories.description: Add backend test for completedItems flow and frontend test for reconciled item rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend test: completedItems passed to processMeetingExtraction
Frontend test: reconciled item renders with matched text
